description.content: Returns a list of all vehicle makes (manufacturers). Supports filtering by publication state, vehicle type, and year. Returns make ID, name, nice name (URL-friendly slug), and model count.

query.description: Publication state filter: new, used, or future
Response detail level: basic or full

description.content: Returns all models for a given vehicle make. Supports filtering by publication state and year. Returns model ID, name, nice name, and the parent make.

query.description: Publication state: new, used, or future

variable.description: (Required) URL-friendly make name (e.g. toyota, ford, chevrolet)

response.name: List of vehicle models for the make

variable.description: (Required) URL-friendly make name (e.g. toyota, ford, chevrolet)
(Required) URL-friendly make name (e.g. toyota, ford, chevrolet)

description.content: Returns all available model years for a specific make and model. Includes publication state and the list of styles (trims) for each year.

response.name: List of model years with styles

description.content: Returns complete details for a specific vehicle style (trim), including specifications, options, standard equipment, colors, and pricing.

query.description: Response detail level: basic or full

description.content: Returns complete details for a specific vehicle style (trim), including specifications, options, standard equipment, colors, and pricing.

query.description: Response detail level: basic or full

description.content: Returns photo assets for a specific vehicle style, including exterior, interior, and color swatch images with multiple sizes. Photos are available via the Edmunds CDN.

Returns True Market Value (TMV) pricing for a vehicle style. TMV is Edmunds' estimate of what consumers are actually paying for a vehicle in a given area. Supports new and used vehicle pricing with zip code localization.

query.description: (Required) 5-digit US ZIP code for regional pricing
Used vehicle condition: Outstanding, Clean, Average, Rough

description.content: Search dealer inventory for vehicles matching make, model, year, and geographic criteria. Returns a list of matching vehicles with dealer information, pricing, and listing details.

The Edmunds Vehicle API provides comprehensive automotive data including vehicle makes, models, trims, configurations, specifications, media assets, True Market Value (TMV) pricing, dealer inventories, incentives, and consumer reviews. All responses are in JSON format. Authentication is via API key.
